## Description

<!-- What does this skill do? One or two sentences. -->

## Changes

<!-- List the files added or modified. -->

- [ ] `skill/<name>.md` — new skill file
- [ ] `README.md` — added row to skills table

## Checklist

- [ ] Frontmatter has `name` (kebab-case) and `description` (includes trigger phrases in quotes)
- [ ] Body follows the conventions in `CONTRIBUTING.md` (imperative mood, one instruction per bullet)
- [ ] Skill has a "When to stop" section
- [ ] An example turn is included in the skill file
- [ ] Tested with at least one AI agent (Copilot, Claude, etc.) — skill activates on trigger phrases and behaves as described
- [ ] Row added to the skills table in `README.md`
